notes: Lonza is a global leader in life sciences and specialty chemicals with a significant personal care division. Their fermentation capabilities and lipid-based delivery systems make them a key partner for brands seeking biotechnology-derived cosmetic ingredients. Lonza's Lipex® natural lipid range provides high-performance emolliency and barrier repair, while their fermentation platform produces a range of bioactive compounds with excellent safety and efficacy profiles and consistent GMP-certified quality.
